pagination.mechanism: Click numbered page links in .pagination ul; estimated 25 pages total at 10 items/page

requires_subpages.reason: Listing shows committee, type, dates and title only. Full permit details (decision text, property details, case documents) are on individual announcement subpages.

filter.filter_hint: Only collect rows where .dbb-published-announcements-table-type-column span text equals 'Underrättelse om lovbeslut SBK'

notes: Title field often contains address + case number in format 'Description, Address fastighetsbeteckning, YYYY-NNNNN'. Parse case number from trailing pattern e.g. '2026-04094'. Pagination buttons have no href — interaction may require JavaScript click or URL parameter discovery. Consider increasing page size to 100/sida via the dropdown to reduce pages to ~3. Detail page URL pattern: /digital-bulletin-board/announcements/{uuid}.
